name: Debian Linux
short_description: Debian Linux container accessible over SSH with custom credentials.
description: A clean Debian Linux container with an SSH server. Set your username and password via environment variables to connect from any SSH client. Useful as a remote shell, development sandbox, or lightweight Linux environment accessible from anywhere on your network.
usecases: Run scripts and tools in an isolated Debian environment.
notes: Set SSH_USER and SSH_PASSWORD env vars before deploying
Default credentials are admin / changeme — change before exposing to the network
